title: cicer luteum
intro: Cicer luteum, also known as chickling pea or Indian pea, is a plant species in the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Cicer luteum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Cicer luteum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or powder, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine preparations.
